modules.name: Phasor Beat Map
modules.description: Phasor-driven topographic drum sequencer based on Mutable Instruments Grids. Uses phasor input (0-10V) for playback, enabling reverse, scrub, and non-linear pattern navigation.

modules.name: Phasor Wavetable
modules.description: Phasor-driven wavetable oscillator. Load custom wavetables from WAV files. LFO mode for non-antialiased output, VCO mode with mipmap antialiasing for audio-rate use.
